landing.title: A better you.
landing.subtitle: Istiqoma helps you build consistent habits in prayer, good deeds, and self-reflection. Track your journey to become a better believer, one deed at a time.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to help you balance worldly life with your spiritual obligations.

features.dzikirDesc: Digital tasbih with haptic feedback. Track your daily remembrance of Allah with ease.
features.quranDesc: Set personalized reading goals. Track pages, Juz, or time spent reflecting on the Holy Book.
features.analyticsDesc: Visualize your spiritual growth. Identify areas for improvement with gentle, data-driven insights.
features.remindersDesc: Never miss a Salah. Get timely notifications for prayers and your spiritual goals.
features.targetsDesc: Set meaningful targets for worship. Track your consistency and build lasting habits.
features.communityDesc: Join global challenges for fasting, Dhikr, or charity. Compete in goodness (Khair).
features.badgesDesc: Earn points, streaks, badges, and rankings through spiritual achievements to encourage you to stay consistent.
features.privacyDesc: Your deeds are between you and Allah alone. We never share your spiritual journey with anyone.

personalize.title: Personalize your worship goals
personalize.subtitle: Customize your dashboard to focus on the habits you want to build right now. Start with the obligatory (Fard), then gradually add voluntary ones (Sunnah) as your spiritual growth progresses.
personalize.benefit1: Smart reminders based on your location and calendar.
personalize.benefit2: Privacy first. Your deeds are between you and Allah.
personalize.benefit3: Offline capable for when you disconnect to reconnect.

testimonial.quote: Istiqoma didn't just help to get consistent worshipping Allah every day, it also gave me a visual representation of my relationship with my faith.
testimonial.name: Yahya Pramudya Ekananta

landing.downloadAppDesc: Install Istiqoma on your device for quick access

dashboard.subtitle: What good deeds have you done today?
dashboard.startRecording: Start tracking your good deeds to see your progress over time.
dashboard.noTargetsYet: Set spiritual goals to track your progress automatically

deed.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete this deed from your history.

createDeed.title: Record a New Deed
createDeed.subtitle: Track your good actions to monitor your spiritual progress.
createDeed.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Helped a neighbor, Read Quran...

editDeed.title: Edit Deed
editDeed.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Helped a neighbor, Read Quran...
editDeed.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete this deed from your history.

categories.title: Manage Categories
categories.protectedCategory: This category is protected and cannot be edited or deleted

dzikir.title: Dzikir Counter
dzikir.dzikirDesc: Tap the counter to record your dzikir. Each tap equals 1 point.
dzikir.dzikirReminder: SubhanAllah, Alhamdulillah, Allahu Akbar - Remember Allah often.
dzikir.tapCounterFirst: Tap the counter to add dzikir first.
dzikir.dzikirSavedDesc: {{count}} dzikir counted and saved as {{count}} points.
dzikir.renameHistoryNote: Note: Renaming this type will not update past deed records. Historical deeds will still show the old name.

qibla.title: Qibla & Prayer Times
qibla.locationDesc: To find the direction to Mecca, we need your location. Tap the button below and allow location access when prompted.
qibla.allowLocation: Please allow location access when prompted by your browser.
qibla.rotateDevice: Rotate your device to enable compass (mobile only)
qibla.step1: Hold your device flat and level
qibla.step2: The green arrow points toward the Kaaba in Mecca
qibla.step3: Turn your body until facing the arrow direction

errors.notSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
errors.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.

sholatPage.title: Prayer
sholatPage.noLocationDesc: To display prayer times, we need your location.

progress.title: Progress
progress.noDataDesc: Start recording your deeds to see your progress charts here.

summary.title: Your Summary
summary.totalDeeds: You recorded {{count}} deeds in the last {{period}}.
summary.topCategory: Your most frequent deed is {{category}} with {{count}} entries.
summary.mostActiveDay: Your most active day was {{day}} with {{count}} deeds.
summary.consistency: You did good deeds on {{activeDays}} out of {{totalDays}} days — {{percent}}% consistency.
summary.noData: No deeds recorded in this period. Start logging to see your insights here.
summary.motivationHigh: Mashaa Allah! You are very consistent. Keep up this great habit!
summary.motivationMedium: Good progress! Try to be consistent every day — small steps add up.
summary.motivationLow: Every deed counts, no matter how small. Let's make it a habit, one day at a time.

targets.title: Targets
targets.subtitle: Set and track your spiritual goals
targets.addTargetSubtitle: Create a new goal to track your spiritual progress
targets.renameTargetDesc: Enter a new name for this target
targets.targetNotFoundDesc: The target you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.
targets.noTargetsDesc: Set spiritual goals to track your progress automatically based on your deeds.
targets.targetValueDesc: Minimum points to achieve this period
targets.maxValueDesc: Maximum occurrences to stay within limit
targets.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently remove this target.
targets.noHistory: No history yet. Complete a period to see your past performance.
targets.achievementTypeDesc: Reach a minimum number of points for good deeds
targets.limitTypeDesc: Stay under a maximum limit to avoid sins
targets.targetNamePlaceholder: e.g., Finish reading Quran, Complete 30 juz
targets.intentionCardEmpty: Tell yourself when and where you'll do this. Setting a specific time and place makes you much more likely to follow through.
targets.intentionHelper: Setting a specific time and place makes you much more likely to follow through.
targets.notificationTimesDesc: Set up to 5 reminder times for this target
targets.targetCreatedDesc: Your new target has been added successfully.
targets.targetUpdatedDesc: Your target has been updated successfully.
targets.createError: Failed to create target. Please try again.
targets.updateError: Failed to update target. Please try again.
targets.notFoundDesc: The target you're looking for doesn't exist.
targets.createFolderDesc: Group related targets together to keep things organized.
targets.renameFolderDesc: Enter a new name for this folder.
targets.deleteFolderWarning: The folder will be removed, but the targets inside will be kept and moved out of the folder.
targets.moveToFolderDesc: Choose a folder for this target, or move it out of all folders.
targets.moveError: Failed to move target. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Manage your notification preferences
notifications.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser
notifications.permissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Please enable in browser settings.
notifications.dailyReminderDesc: Get a daily reminder to log your deeds
notifications.targetAlertsDesc: Get notified about your target progress
notifications.sholatReminderDesc: Get notified 10 minutes before each prayer time
notifications.locationRequired: Location access is needed for accurate prayer times
notifications.promptDesc: Get daily reminders and sholat prayer time alerts to help you stay consistent
notifications.promptLocationDesc: Allow location access for accurate prayer time reminders
notifications.soundDesc: Sound played when a notification arrives

reward.congratsMessage: Congratulations on performing a good deed! Keep it up!

deedHistory.title: Deed History
deedHistory.subtitle: Browse and filter all your recorded deeds
deedHistory.tryDifferentFilters: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for.

streak.title: Streak
streak.motivationalMessage: You are consistent in doing good deeds today. Keep it up being Istiqomah every single day!

streakFreezer.title: Streak Freezer
streakFreezer.howItWorksDescription: Buy freezers with your points. When a past day in your streak has no recorded deed, one freezer is automatically used to keep the streak alive. Today is never auto-frozen — you still have time to log a deed.
streakFreezer.noFrozenDays: No days have been frozen yet. Your streak is on solid ground.
streakFreezer.insufficientPointsDescription: Earn more points by recording good deeds, then try again.

recommendations.entryDesc: See personalized suggestions based on your onboarding answers, each backed by a verse from the Quran or an authentic hadith.
recommendations.disclaimer: These are AI-generated suggestions grounded in the Quran and authentic hadith from Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim. Always verify with a trusted scholar.
recommendations.errorDesc: Please try again in a moment.
recommendations.empty: No suggestions are available right now.

onboarding.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
onboarding.bismillahMeaning: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

s1.headline:
Your companion on
becoming better
s1.subtext: Istiqoma is an app that helps you record your daily good deeds — not as an obligation, but as a mirror of the soul.

a.title: Record Spontaneous Good Deeds
a.desc: No targets needed. Simply record any small kindness you do today.

b.title: End-of-Day Reflection
b.desc: Gently reminded in the evening to reflect on the day that has passed.

c.title: See Your Journey
c.desc: Your record of deeds becomes the story of you growing as a Muslim.

s2.headline:
Benefits you
will feel

a.title: A Calmer Heart
a.desc: Awareness of your deeds makes your heart more grateful

b.title: A New Identity
b.desc: Slowly build yourself as a Muslim who is istiqomah

c.title: Meaningful Worship
c.desc: Every small deed feels meaningful and beautifully recorded

d.title: Consistency
d.desc: Helped to stay consistent without feeling burdened

s2.hadithText: "Verily, the most beloved deeds to Allah are the most consistent ones."

q1.question: How is your worship right now?
q1.hint: Pick what most honestly describes you

options.pemula: Just starting to learn and want to do better
options.naik-turun: Up and down, struggling to stay consistent
options.cukup-baik: Already fairly regular, want more istiqomah
options.tingkatkan: Want to raise the overall quality of my worship

q2.question: What most often holds you back from doing more good?
q2.hint: Be honest — there are no wrong answers

options.lupa: I often forget or miss the opportunity
options.males: I know what to do, but feel lazy doing it
options.tidak-tahu: I don't know what daily good deeds I could do
options.sibuk: Busyness leaves me no time to reflect

q3.question: Which deeds do you want to focus on?
q3.hint: Pick as many as you like — at least 1

q4.question: When is the best time to reflect on your day?
q4.hint: We'll send a reminder at this time

options.subuh: After Subuh — set the day with good intent
options.isya: After Isya — close the day with gratitude

q5.question: I want to be known as a Muslim who is…
q5.hint: This is the identity you'll build together with Istiqoma

dekat-allah.label: Close to Allah
dekat-allah.sublabel: Worship feels light, the heart always connected

bermanfaat.label: Beneficial to others
bermanfaat.sublabel: My presence brings real impact to those around me

berilmu.label: Knowledgeable and wise
berilmu.sublabel: Always learning and practising the deen with excellence

istiqomah.label: Istiqomah and steadfast
istiqomah.sublabel: Consistent in good even when no one is watching

keluarga.label: An example in the family
keluarga.sublabel: Being an imam, mother, or child who carries goodness

result.note: This identity isn't a label — it is who you are becoming, one good deed at a time.

dekat-allah.name: A Muslim Close to Allah
dekat-allah.desc: You long for a sincere connection with Allah. Every deed you record in Istiqoma is a real step closer to Him — one kindness at a time.

bermanfaat.name: A Beneficial Muslim
bermanfaat.desc: You believe the best of people are those most beneficial to others. Istiqoma will help you see how much goodness you've already spread.

berilmu.name: A Knowledgeable Muslim
berilmu.desc: You understand that knowledge is light. Istiqoma will accompany you in recording every step of learning and practice — for knowledge without action is a tree without fruit.

istiqomah.name: A Steadfast Muslim
istiqomah.desc: Istiqomah isn't about perfection — it's about not stopping. With Istiqoma, you'll see how consistent you really are, even on the heaviest days.

keluarga.name: A Family Role Model
keluarga.desc: The greatest goodness begins at home. Every deed you plant today is an inheritance for those you love most.

identityFallback.name: A Growing Muslim
identityFallback.desc: Your journey begins today. Every small step you take is proof that you are growing into the best version of yourself.

hint.title: Continue from onboarding
hint.subtitle: You picked these deeds during onboarding. Set targets to begin.
